metadata.comparison: Reader (OPC UA client + internal structures) vs Target AAS models
metadata.note: Reader does not expose OPC UA server; comparison is reader data/methods vs target contract for Product/Cell/Transport

provided_by_reader.CurrentId: no - reader has sUid but does not write to PLC

reader_summary.direct_plc_variable_writes: None (reader does not write CurrentId, CurrentPosition, ActionStatus per existing reports)

TARGET_CELL_AAS.reader_relevance: Reader consumes cell info (CellInfo.IDofCell, IP, ProcessTypes) and calls cell methods. Reader does not host Cell AAS.
TARGET_CELL_AAS.missing_elements: N/A - Reader is client; Cell AAS is on PLC.

extra_elements_in_reader.direction: Reader uses for own identity and position reporting

datatype_mismatches.recommendation: Convert to string when writing to PLC or when aligning with target

TARGET_CELL_AAS.access_level_mismatches: Reader only reads cell data via custom methods (Inquire, etc.); target Cell nodes are Read on PLC - no conflict.
TARGET_CELL_AAS.synchronization_gaps: Reader calls custom Inquire/Rezervation/DoProcess/IsFinished/Occupancy instead of PLC AAS methods (GetSupported, ReserveAction, GetStatus, etc.). Aligning reader to call PLC ReserveAction and to write Product/position to PLC would reduce gaps.

TARGET_PRODUCT_AAS.reader_relevance: Reader owns product source (NFC tag). Target ProductCore is mirrored in PLC; reader must write writable_by_reader nodes.

missing_elements.description: Reader does not currently send timestamp to PLC

extra_elements_in_reader.direction: Reader→PLC (must convert to string and write)

rename_candidates.suggested_usage: Convert to hex string, write to PLC CurrentId and/or dedicated TagUID if added

datatype_mismatches.recommendation: Convert UID to string (e.g. hex) when writing to PLC
Compatible; write as Int or string
Convert to string when writing position to PLC

TARGET_PRODUCT_AAS.access_level_mismatches: Target marks ProductID, TagUID, State, Timestamp, ErrorCode, CurrentId, CurrentPosition as writable by reader. Reader currently does not write any PLC variables - implementation gap.

synchronization_gaps.gap: Product ID not written to PLC
synchronization_gaps.action: After NFC read, convert UID to string, write to CurrentId

synchronization_gaps.gap: Current position not written to PLC
synchronization_gaps.action: On tag detected, write cell ID (as string) to CurrentPosition

synchronization_gaps.plc_target: No dedicated State/RecipeID variables in current PLC
synchronization_gaps.action: Add PLC variables per target or use ActionStatus string
Update ActionStatus when transport/process state changes

TARGET_TRANSPORT_AAS.reader_relevance: Transport AAS is PLC-only; reader does not control transport. Reader triggers transport indirectly via cell reservation/process.
TARGET_TRANSPORT_AAS.missing_elements: N/A - Reader does not implement or own Transport AAS.
TARGET_TRANSPORT_AAS.datatype_mismatches: None - reader does not read/write Transport nodes.
TARGET_TRANSPORT_AAS.synchronization_gaps: Reader uses Rezervation/DoProcess to reserve and start process; transport is one process type. No direct Transport AAS sync required from reader; PLC owns Transport.

gaps.recommendation: Use PLC ReserveAction with String argument (encode reservation ID)
Consider using GetStatus or align semantics
Map Inquire to GetSupported if semantics match, or keep custom
No direct AAS method; keep or define as cell-specific
Could map to Cell occupancy variable if added to target

summary.cell: Reader uses cell info and custom methods; no Cell AAS hosted on reader. Align method calls to PLC AAS where possible.
summary.product: Reader has all ProductCore source data (UID, recipe, state) but does not write to PLC. Critical: implement writes of ProductID (from UID), CurrentPosition, and optionally State/ActionStatus to meet target contract.
summary.transport: Reader does not interact with Transport AAS; no gaps from reader side.
